title: Platypus Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by emergencyWithdraw() on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls emergencyWithdraw() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

monitoring_rules: BLOCK emergencyWithdraw() if preceded by flash loan borrow in the same transaction
summary: Platypus Finance lost $8.5M to a flash loan attack exploiting a flaw in the USP solvency check mechanism. A flash loan was taken, used as collateral to borrow USP, and then emergencyWithdraw() was called to drain liquidity. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
